name: Chicken Macadamia
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the chicken in a pot of water until it becomes tender.
2. Remove the bones and cut the chicken into chunks.
3. Mix together flour, salt, pepper, and paprika to create a coating.
4. Roll each piece of chicken in the flour mixture.
5. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
6. Lightly brown the coated chicken pieces in the hot oil.
7. Pour pineapple juice and vinegar over the chicken.
8. Sprinkle brown sugar evenly over the chicken.
9. Cover the pot and simmer for 20 to 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
10. Before serving, sprinkle macadamia nuts on top of the dish.
11. Serve with cooked rice.
